productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Co Graphic White Tshirts
description: Composition White round neck short sleeved t-shirt made of 100% cotton, ribbed neckline with fabric tape detailing on the inseam, adidas' three stripes in dark blue appliqued on the sleeves,tri-coloured loop on the nape of the neck, graphic print on the front with lettering, along with brand name and logo, stitch detailing on the front and hem, and brand badge appliqued on the hem at the left Fitting Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Warm iron Do not iron on prints/trims/embroidery Do not dry clean If your heart beats for Sports, this white t-shirt from adidas will look great on your back. There is no sports team without its fans right? Wear this cotton tee and cheer for your favorite team until your voice is hoarse! Team it with jeans or shorts to get a look worth killing for! Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6', Shoulders-18"
